.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 17 instead of JDK 15 to align with the target Java version.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Replace Math.random() with ThreadLocalRandom for better performance and thread-safety in random number generation.
Remove unused import for @Autowired annotation as it is no longer used in the class.
Remove @Autowired annotation from constructor to rely on Spring's single-constructor injection inference.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/src/main/java/de/.general_idea: Add message argument to Assert.notNull calls to provide better error messages.
Remove @Autowired annotation from constructor to rely on Spring's implicit single-constructor injection.
Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to rely on Spring Boot's implicit single-constructor injection.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.general_idea: Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to rely on Spring's implicit single-constructor injection.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version from the reactor-core dependency to let Spring Boot manage it.
raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 manages the version of reactor-core; specifying an old version manually can cause dependency conflicts or incompatibilities with the Spring Boot 3 managed BOM.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version from the netty-all dependency to let Spring Boot manage it.
raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 manages the version of netty-all; specifying an old version manually can cause dependency conflicts or incompatibilities with the Spring Boot 3 managed BOM.
